series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with ODNR authorization for construction of a private dock. This series includes, but is not limited to: any application, permit, fee, or other record related to state authorization for construction of a private dock.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for life of private dock, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for life of private dock, then destroy. If paper records are scanned and stored in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
